title: Bounties
description: Gnars Bounties are challenges from the community: pay athletes in ETH to land the tricks, runs, and stunts the DAO wants to see filmed.

grid.empty: No bounties found matching your filters.

manifesto.p1: Gnars Bounties builds on prior community-driven moments by enabling direct, permissionless execution. It removes friction from traditional grant systems, allowing ideas to be posted, funded, completed, and rewarded onchain in a simple, open flow.
manifesto.howItWorksBody: Create or select a bounty → fund or support a mission → execute and submit work → get verified → receive onchain payment

detail.noClaimsDescription: Be the first to complete this challenge. Film your proof and submit it on-chain.
detail.useSubmitForVote: Use Submit for Vote — contributors must vote to accept.
detail.poidhDescription: POIDH (Pics Or It Didn’t Happen) is a decentralized bounty platform where anyone can create challenges and reward proof with ETH.
detail.proofDescription: Have proof of completion? Submit a claim directly on-chain.
detail.addFundsDescription: Contribute ETH to increase the reward for this bounty.
detail.connectToContribute: Connect your wallet to contribute to this bounty.
detail.withdrawDescription: This bounty was canceled. Recover your contribution.
detail.cancelDescription: Cancel and recover your funds. This cannot be undone.

pendingWithdrawal.fromWinnings: From bounty winnings or a cancelled open bounty.

voteDashboard.weightedNote: Weighted by ETH contribution — {total} ETH total
voteDashboard.votePeriodEnded: Vote period ended — resolve when ready

createModal.title: Create a Bounty
createModal.description: Post a challenge and reward proof of completion with ETH.
createModal.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to create a bounty.
createModal.successDescription: Your bounty is live. Share it with the community to get submissions.
createModal.successNote: It may take a moment for the bounty to appear in the list.
createModal.wrongNetwork: Your wallet is on {currentChain}. Switch to {targetChain} to continue.
createModal.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Land a kickflip down the 5-stair
createModal.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the challenge and what counts as valid proof...
createModal.openNote: Open bounties let anyone add funds to grow the prize pool.
createModal.soloNote: Solo bounties are self-funded — only you contribute to the prize pool.

claimModal.title: Submit Your Proof
claimModal.description: Claim this bounty on {chain} by submitting your proof of completion.
claimModal.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to submit a claim.
claimModal.successDescription: Your proof is on-chain. The bounty issuer will review it.
claimModal.proofPlaceholder: Describe your proof and include links to photos/videos...
claimModal.mediaUrlPlaceholder: https://... link to your video or photo
claimModal.wrongNetwork: Your wallet is on {currentChain}. Switch to {targetChain} to submit.
